title: nervilia pallidiflora
intro: Nervilia pallidiflora, also known as the pale yellow nerf, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nervilia pallidiflora include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing, making it a valuable resource in the treatment of various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or a tincture, and is also used to make a medicinal tea.
